description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on a schedule, on push to master and development branches, and on pull requests targeting these branches. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to run tests on different operating systems (ubuntu-latest, with some exclusions), Python versions (3.7 to 3.10), and installation kinds (conda, source, dist). For each job, check out the code, set up Python, install dependencies using conda, source, or dist methods, run tests with pytest and optional code coverage, and check for leftover files.
